title: stanhopea panamensis
intro: Stanhopea panamensis, also known as the Panama stanhopea, is a species of orchid native to Central America. This epiphytic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stanhopea panamensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant. It is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, where the plant's aerial parts are steeped in hot water to release its bioactive compounds.
